name: assumption-killer
description: Cross-agent assumption gate workflow that blocks implementation until high-risk assumptions are verified with repo evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Force agents to identify, verify, and record assumptions before implementation.
interface.longDescription: Assumption Killer provides a cross-agent Assumption Gate workflow for Codex, GitHub Copilot, Claude, and similar coding agents. It requires agents to record assumptions, risk levels, verification evidence, implementation decisions, and final validation in machine-checkable artifacts before code changes proceed.
defaultPrompt: Use the Assumption Killer workflow before implementation.
Verify high-risk assumptions with repository evidence.
Run the assumption gate check before the final response.
